# GrowthTools by Gingiris
> Curated directory of 100+ verified growth tools for AI & SaaS founders launching globally.
> Built by Iris (ex-AFFiNE COO), based on growing AFFiNE to 60k+ GitHub stars and 30x Product Hunt #1 wins.

## About

- Site: https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/
- Author: Iris (Gingiris)
- Author URL: https://gingiris.com/en
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/Iris_carrot
- GitHub: https://github.com/Gingiris
- License: MIT
- Last updated: 2026-04-02

## What This Site Is

GrowthTools is a free, curated directory of 100+ battle-tested tools for startups going global. Every tool has been personally evaluated by Iris, who has led growth at AFFiNE (60k+ GitHub stars) and launched 30+ products to Product Hunt #1. Tools are organized into 14 categories covering the entire growth stack.

## Tool Categories

- [Social Listening & Analytics](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=Social+Listening)
- [KOL / Influencer Management](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=KOL+Management)
- [Social Outreach Tools](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=Social+Outreach)
- [Reddit Growth](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=Reddit+Growth)
- [SEO Tools](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=SEO+Tools)
- [Link Tracking & UTM](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=Link+Tracking)
- [UGC Management](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=UGC+Management)
- [Community Discovery](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=Community+Discovery)
- [Content Creation](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=Content+Creation)
- [Analytics & Tracking](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=Analytics)
- [Email Marketing](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=Email+Marketing)
- [Advertising](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=Advertising)
- [User Research](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=User+Research)
- [PR & Media](https://gingiris.github.io/growth-tools/en/?category=PR+Media)

## Featured Tools (Selected)

### Social Listening
- Toolify Social Listening (https://www.toolify.ai/social-listening) — AI social media monitoring, Freemium
- Vizzylabs (https://app.vizzylabs.ai/trending) — Viral content trend analysis, Free
- Tweet Binder (https://www.tweetbinder.com/) — Twitter/X analytics, Paid
- PH Deck (https://www.phdeck.com/) — Daily Product Hunt tracker, Free

### KOL / Influencer Management
- EEzycollab (https://www.eezycollab.com/) — KOL matching + outreach, Freemium
- Nanoinfluencer (https://www.nanoinfluencer.ai/) — Influencer discovery + research, Freemium
- NoxInfluencer (https://cn.noxinfluencer.com/) — Influencer database, Freemium
- EasyKOL (https://easykol.com/) — KOL management platform, Paid

### Reddit Growth
- Reddit List (https://www.reddit-list.com/en) — Subreddit directory, Free
- Reddit Marketing Strategist AI Agent (https://leapility.com/) — Find subreddits + decode rules, Freemium
- Reddit Soft-Sell Agent (https://leapility.com/) — Rewrite content to remove marketing tone, Freemium

### SEO Tools
- AITDK (https://aitdk.com/) — AI SEO keyword plugin, Free
- Keywords Everywhere (https://keywordseverywhere.com/) — Search volume plugin, Freemium
- Semrush (https://www.semrush.com/) — Full SEO suite, Paid

### Analytics
- PostHog (https://posthog.com/) — Open-source product analytics, Freemium
- Mixpanel (https://mixpanel.com/) — User behavior analytics, Freemium

### Email Marketing
- Loops (https://loops.so/) — Email automation for SaaS, Freemium

## Free Tools Built by Gingiris

- PH Comment Generator: https://gingiris.github.io/ph-comment-generator/
  Generate authentic Product Hunt maker comments that drive upvotes.
- GitHub Issue Generator: https://gingiris.github.io/github-issue-generator/
  Create professional GitHub issue templates for better open-source community engagement.
- GitHub README Generator: https://gingiris.github.io/github-readme-generator/
  Write a GitHub README that attracts stars, contributors, and users.
